events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail / critical risk** — misreading locate mark colors (per the APWA/811/CGA uniform color code) is a life-safety identification error that can lead excavation crews into gas or electric strikes, not a cosmetic issue. Corrective actions specified are re-verification/re-marking by the locator, crew retraining on color-code reading, and cross-checking against the active locate ticket before excavation resumes.
